rationale.root_cause: They identified CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad as freeing the same pointer twice (around lines 32 and 34) without any intervening modification, explaining the double-free mechanism. This directly names the FLAW site and cause in this file.
rationale.local_fix: They explicitly recommend removing the second free (keeping only a single free) and show the change. This satisfies the requirement to remove the second free at the FLAW site.
rationale.global_fix: They propose a single-owner cleanup pattern (e.g., RAII/unique ownership) so each allocation has exactly one deallocation site and clear ownership transfer. This addresses the root cause by enforcing one responsible free per allocation.
